## Testing Checklist

- [ ] Unit tests pass (`npm run test:unit:run`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Build succeeds (`npm run build:all`)
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Existing tests updated if behavior changed

### Platform Testing (if UI changes)

- [ ] Chrome
- [ ] Firefox
- [ ] Safari
- [ ] Mobile responsive

### Backend Testing (if API changes)

- [ ] API endpoints return correct responses
- [ ] WebSocket messages are well-formed
- [ ] Error cases are handled
- [ ] Backend tests pass (`npm run test:backend`)
